name: healthpoint-rs
description: Read-only MCP server for Healthpoint HL7 FHIR directory lookup with synthetic default mode and BYO-key live mode.
long_description: healthpoint-rs provides read-only MCP tools, resources, resource templates, and prompts for Healthpoint HL7 FHIR directory lookup. It starts without credentials in synthetic fixture mode for safe installation and validation. Live Healthpoint access is opt-in and requires the user's own licensed API key. The bundle contains no Healthpoint data or secrets.

tools.name: healthpoint.diagnostic.status
tools.title: Healthpoint diagnostic status
tools.description: Return redacted diagnostic status for the configured Healthpoint MCP runtime, including synthetic/live mode. Never returns API keys or secret values.

tools.name: healthpoint.access.notes
tools.title: Healthpoint access notes
tools.description: Show non-secret Healthpoint API access notes discovered from the licensed portal, including endpoint, auth header, supported read resources, and documentation paths.

tools.name: healthpoint.access.policy
tools.title: Healthpoint access policy
tools.description: Show the conservative Healthpoint access and export policy before exporting, caching, sharing, or reusing Healthpoint-derived data.

tools.name: healthpoint.services.search
tools.title: Search Healthpoint services
tools.description: Search Healthpoint HealthcareService records by text, category, service type, SNOMED, specialty, region filters, cursor, and result limit. Synthetic mode uses bundled fixtures; live mode requires a licensed API key.

text.description: Optional full-text search term such as a service need, programme, or provider phrase.

category.description: Optional repeatable FHIR HealthcareService.category code or system|code token.

service_type.description: Optional repeatable FHIR HealthcareService.type code or system|code token.

snomed.description: Optional repeatable SNOMED CT service type code. Values are converted to SNOMED system tokens.

specialty.description: Optional repeatable FHIR HealthcareService.specialty code or system|code token.

branch_code.description: Optional Healthpoint branch code filter such as primary.

region.description: Optional Healthpoint region filter such as Southland.

dhb_region.description: Optional Healthpoint DHB region filter such as Southern.

subregion.description: Optional Healthpoint subregion filter such as Ashburton.

cursor.description: Optional pagination cursor returned by a previous response. Absolute cursors must be same-origin.

limit.description: Maximum result count. Values are clamped to the safe range 1..100.

outputSchema.description: Page of Healthpoint service records with provenance and pagination metadata.

tools.name: healthpoint.services.search_snomed
tools.title: Search Healthpoint services by SNOMED
tools.description: Search Healthpoint HealthcareService records by SNOMED CT code in service type, category, or specialty. Synthetic mode uses bundled fixtures; live mode requires a licensed API key.

code.description: SNOMED CT code to search for, without the system prefix.

field.description: HealthcareService field to search: type, category, or specialty. Defaults to type.

limit.description: Maximum result count. Values are clamped to the safe range 1..100.

outputSchema.description: Page of Healthpoint service records matching the SNOMED filter.

tools.name: healthpoint.services.nearby
tools.title: Find nearby Healthpoint services
tools.description: Find Healthpoint HealthcareService records near a latitude/longitude point with optional radius, text, service type, and result limit. Synthetic mode uses bundled fixtures; live mode requires a licensed API key.

lat.description: Latitude in decimal degrees for the nearby search origin.

lon.description: Longitude in decimal degrees for the nearby search origin.

text.description: Optional full-text search term to combine with the geographic filter.

service_type.description: Optional FHIR HealthcareService.type code or system|code token.

limit.description: Maximum result count. Values are clamped to the safe range 1..100.

outputSchema.description: Page of nearby Healthpoint service records with provenance.

tools.name: healthpoint.service.get
tools.title: Get Healthpoint service
tools.description: Read one Healthpoint HealthcareService record by FHIR id. Synthetic mode uses bundled fixtures; live mode requires a licensed API key.

id.description: FHIR resource id to read. Path separators and unsafe characters are rejected before request construction.

outputSchema.description: One Healthpoint HealthcareService record with provenance.

tools.name: healthpoint.location.get
tools.title: Get Healthpoint location
tools.description: Read one Healthpoint Location record by FHIR id. Synthetic mode uses bundled fixtures; live mode requires a licensed API key.

id.description: FHIR resource id to read. Path separators and unsafe characters are rejected before request construction.

outputSchema.description: One Healthpoint Location record with provenance.

tools.name: healthpoint.organization.get
tools.title: Get Healthpoint organization
tools.description: Read one Healthpoint Organization record by FHIR id. Synthetic mode uses bundled fixtures; live mode requires a licensed API key.

id.description: FHIR resource id to read. Path separators and unsafe characters are rejected before request construction.

outputSchema.description: One Healthpoint Organization record with provenance.

tools.name: healthpoint.resource.read
tools.title: Read Healthpoint resource URI
tools.description: Read a supported healthpoint:// resource URI through the same safe read-only provider path as native MCP resources.

uri.description: Supported healthpoint:// URI, such as healthpoint://service/{id}, healthpoint://location/{id}, or healthpoint://organization/{id}.

outputSchema.description: The service, location, or organization resource addressed by the URI.

resources.name: API access notes
resources.description: Non-secret Healthpoint API endpoint and access notes

resources.name: Access policy
resources.description: Conservative Healthpoint access and export policy

resource_templates.name: HealthcareService
resource_templates.description: Read one Healthpoint HealthcareService by FHIR id

resource_templates.name: Location
resource_templates.description: Read one Healthpoint Location by FHIR id

resource_templates.name: Organization
resource_templates.description: Read one Healthpoint Organization by FHIR id

prompts.name: healthpoint_safe_search
prompts.description: Draft a safe Healthpoint service-search request using licensed, read-only access.

arguments.name: need
arguments.description: Plain-language service need, such as immunisation, GP, or pharmacy

prompts.text: Search Healthpoint for ${arguments.need}. Apply only supplied filters. Return concise directory results with provenance, attribution, and no clinical advice. Do not expose API keys or cache/publicly redistribute returned data.

prompts.name: healthpoint_license_check
prompts.description: Prepare a license/export safety check before using Healthpoint data.
prompts.text: Before using Healthpoint data, check the access policy resource and confirm the use is local-only, attributed, read-only, non-production unless approved in writing, and not a bulk dump, public cache, resale, redistribution, competing directory, or AI-training dataset.

healthpoint_mode.title: Healthpoint mode
healthpoint_mode.description: Runtime mode. Use synthetic for no-credential fixture data, or live for licensed Healthpoint API calls.

healthpoint_api_key.title: Healthpoint API key
healthpoint_api_key.description: Optional user-provided licensed Healthpoint API key or token. Required only when healthpoint_mode is live.

healthpoint_base_url.title: Healthpoint base URL
healthpoint_base_url.description: Healthpoint FHIR base URL for live mode.

healthpoint_geo_search_mode.title: Nearby search encoding
healthpoint_geo_search_mode.description: Encoding strategy for nearby live searches.

healthpoint_timeout_secs.title: HTTP timeout seconds
healthpoint_timeout_secs.description: Per-request live HTTP timeout in seconds, clamped to 1..300.
